attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who prioritizes KOM points over stage wins, willing to enter early breaks and manage efforts across multiple days to secure classification jerseys.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways, minimal team support evident; relies on individual positioning intelligence rather than coordinated setups to collect points.
terrain_preference: Categorized climbs where KOM points are available; excels in multi-day point accumulation strategies rather than single explosive summit finishes.
vulnerability: Can be dropped on harder climbs when pace intensifies, relies on tactical positioning over pure climbing power; frustrated by non-cooperative breakaway companions.
key_patterns: Targets KOM classification through multi-day point accumulation rather than stage victory focus (3 observations)
Demonstrates exceptional positioning intelligence to maximize points with minimal energy expenditure (2 observations)
Willing to sacrifice stage result for classification objectives, tactically pragmatic approach (2 observations)
Functions effectively as breakaway rider without major team support infrastructure (3 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 4-year gap in observations makes trajectory unclear, but tactical approach remains consistent across timeframes
